title: What is Property Key?
description: A Property Key is the first argument of commands like SetElement, Click, etc. It acts as an identifier that points to three essential components:

steps.title: Step 1: Inspect the HTML Element to Get Locator and Locator Value
steps.description: Use browser dev tools to inspect the field (e.g., Last Name field):

steps.title: Step 2: Define the Locator in a Properties File
steps.description: Open your properties file (e.g., customer.properties) and configure the locator like this:

steps.title: Step 3: Use the Property Key in a Command
steps.description: Now you can use the Property Key (LastNameTextField) as the first argument in a command:
